title: paeonia × lemoinei
intro: Paeonia × lemoinei, also known as Lemoine peony, is a hybrid plant derived from the intersection of Paeonia lactiflora and Paeonia officinalis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paeonia × lemoinei include its ability to reduce pain, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Paeonia × lemoinei is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to promote relaxation and well-being.
